commands.command: g++ -std=c++17 -I cpp/include cpp/src/compiler/cgc.cpp cpp/src/parser/parser.cpp cpp/src/lexer/tokenizer.cpp cpp/src/ast/ast_printer.cpp cpp/src/semantic/symbol_table.cpp cpp/src/semantic/type_checker.cpp cpp/src/ir/ssa_ir.cpp cpp/src/ir/optimizer.cpp cpp/src/bytecode/bytecode_generator.cpp -o cpp/build/cgc.exe

g++ -std=c++17 -I cpp/include cpp/src/compiler/cgd.cpp cpp/src/parser/parser.cpp cpp/src/lexer/tokenizer.cpp cpp/src/ast/ast_printer.cpp cpp/src/semantic/symbol_table.cpp cpp/src/semantic/type_checker.cpp cpp/src/ir/ssa_ir.cpp cpp/src/ir/optimizer.cpp cpp/src/bytecode/bytecode_generator.cpp -o cpp/build/cgd.exe

commands.description: 编译器和反汇编器测试
commands.command: cpp/build/cgc.exe -v -IR -debug examples/hello_csgo.cg -o examples/hello_csgo.cgb ; if($?) { cpp/build/cgd.exe examples/hello_csgo.cgb }

commands.description: 运行 Go VM 测试

commands.command: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force dist/cg_compiler, dist/cg_vm | Out-Null; go build -o dist/csgo.exe csgo.go; if($?) { g++ -std=c++17 -I cpp/include cpp/src/compiler/cgc.cpp cpp/src/parser/parser.cpp cpp/src/lexer/tokenizer.cpp cpp/src/ast/ast_printer.cpp cpp/src/semantic/symbol_table.cpp cpp/src/semantic/type_checker.cpp cpp/src/ir/ssa_ir.cpp cpp/src/ir/optimizer.cpp cpp/src/bytecode/bytecode_generator.cpp -o dist/cg_compiler/cgc.exe }; if($?) { g++ -std=c++17 -I cpp/include cpp/src/compiler/cgd.cpp cpp/src/parser/parser.cpp cpp/src/lexer/tokenizer.cpp cpp/src/ast/ast_printer.cpp cpp/src/semantic/symbol_table.cpp cpp/src/semantic/type_checker.cpp cpp/src/ir/ssa_ir.cpp cpp/src/ir/optimizer.cpp cpp/src/bytecode/bytecode_generator.cpp -o dist/cg_compiler/cgd.exe };if($?) { cd go;go build -o ../dist/cg_vm/cgr.exe ./cmd/cgr.go }
